artifact_safety.source_data: Synthetic Synthea patients and public ClinicalTrials.gov trial metadata.

basis.warning: This policy is a demo artifact, not a production default. Revisit after the planned 20/26 label gate.

rules.rationale: Deterministic demographics are already directly checkable.
Deterministic demographics are already directly checkable.
Retrieved observations help reviewer inspection; missing labs remain indeterminate in every assumption mode.
Open-world absence is not proof of absence; surface retrieved rows without spending adjudicator calls by default.
Open-world absence-dependent decisions need visible evidence context.
Medication exposure often benefits from surfaced rows and route/status context.
Medication absence is not safely decisive under incomplete charts.
Temporal source rows help review without making hidden-chart assumptions.
Free-text criteria need reviewer context; bounded adjudication remains opt-in until labels are larger.
Closed-world labels are too sparse in this slice to justify extra default spend.

allowed_when: the user explicitly requests citation-grounded adjudication or the workflow is a budgeted eval sweep
bounded_adjudication_escalation.not_default_reason: In this 8-label open-world slice it did not improve labeled accuracy or abstention, while adding 695 calls / $0.1678.
